title: Add discount calculation helper
description: Adds a pure function to compute a discounted price, with unit tests.

files.diff:
+def apply_discount(price, percent):
+    """Return price after applying a percentage discount."""
+    if percent < 0 or percent > 100:
+        raise ValueError("percent must be between 0 and 100")
+    return price * (1 - percent / 100)

+def test_apply_discount_basic():
+    assert apply_discount(100, 10) == 90
+
+def test_apply_discount_invalid_percent():
+    import pytest
+    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
+        apply_discount(100, 150)
